answers.where: Voxelheim Frost Keep Rebuilder after an offline return reward.
answers.action: Collect the camp return, then spend Frost Blocks or Frost Shards to rebuild faster.
answers.response: Major actions now produce visible bursts, floaters, popup rewards, and audio cue counters in DevAPI.
answers.reward: The player sees gold, blocks, shards, permanent blueprints, and offline value as explicit rewards.
answers.game_look: The screen has a snowy idle RPG battle scene, a named keep objective, readable economy panels, and animated reward juice.

issues.text: Transient reward floaters can still overlap one line of blueprint detail for a short frame.
